name: Spicy Rice
recipeIngredient: ~½ cup hot salsa (home made if you have it)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick frying pan over low heat, add the chopped onion and peppers. Stir frequently to prevent burning.
2. Add the salsa and tomatoes when the onions and peppers are soft. Heat until bubbling.
3. Add the cooked rice and stir continuously until everything is heated through and hot.
After serving the first helping, add ½ cup of leftover cut corn for added color and texture. This makes an excellent one-dish dinner.
